verses.text: To Ephesus: He who holds the stars commends their labour and patience, that they 'canst not bear them which are evil.' Tireless. They toiled and tested false apostles.
To Ephesus: He who holds the stars commends their labour and patience, that they 'canst not bear them which are evil.' Tireless. They toiled and tested false apostles.
To Ephesus: He who holds the stars commends their labour and patience, that they 'canst not bear them which are evil.' Tireless. They toiled and tested false apostles.
'Nevertheless I have somewhat against thee, because thou hast left thy first love.' Remember, repent, do the first works. Lost love. Sound doctrine without warm love must be repented.
'Nevertheless I have somewhat against thee, because thou hast left thy first love.' Remember, repent, do the first works. Lost love. Sound doctrine without warm love must be repented.
He hates the Nicolaitanes' deeds, as they do; 'to him that overcometh will I give to eat of the tree of life.' Overcomer's reward. The faithful will eat of life's tree.
He hates the Nicolaitanes' deeds, as they do; 'to him that overcometh will I give to eat of the tree of life.' Overcomer's reward. The faithful will eat of life's tree.
To Smyrna, the dead and living Lord knows their tribulation and poverty — 'but thou art rich.' True riches. The persecuted poor are rich toward God.
To Smyrna, the dead and living Lord knows their tribulation and poverty — 'but thou art rich.' True riches. The persecuted poor are rich toward God.
'Be thou faithful unto death, and I will give thee a crown of life'; the overcomer escapes 'the second death.' Faithful to death. Endurance wins the crown of life.
'Be thou faithful unto death, and I will give thee a crown of life'; the overcomer escapes 'the second death.' Faithful to death. Endurance wins the crown of life.
To Pergamos, where 'Satan's seat' is, they held fast His name even when Antipas was slain. Steadfast. They kept the faith in a hostile city.
To Pergamos, where 'Satan's seat' is, they held fast His name even when Antipas was slain. Steadfast. They kept the faith in a hostile city.
Yet some hold 'the doctrine of Balaam' and the Nicolaitanes, a stumbling-block. Mixed church. Tolerated error corrupts the faithful.
Yet some hold 'the doctrine of Balaam' and the Nicolaitanes, a stumbling-block. Mixed church. Tolerated error corrupts the faithful.
'Repent; or else I will come... and will fight against them.' The overcomer gets 'hidden manna' and 'a white stone.' Repent. Christ rewards those who turn and overcome.
'Repent; or else I will come... and will fight against them.' The overcomer gets 'hidden manna' and 'a white stone.' Repent. Christ rewards those who turn and overcome.
To Thyatira, the Son of God, eyes like fire, knows their works and charity, 'the last to be more than the first.' Growing. Their love and service increased.
To Thyatira, the Son of God, eyes like fire, knows their works and charity, 'the last to be more than the first.' Growing. Their love and service increased.
But they suffer 'that woman Jezebel' to teach and seduce; He gives space to repent; 'I am he which searcheth the reins and hearts.' Searching Lord. Christ sees every heart and judges.
But they suffer 'that woman Jezebel' to teach and seduce; He gives space to repent; 'I am he which searcheth the reins and hearts.' Searching Lord. Christ sees every heart and judges.
But they suffer 'that woman Jezebel' to teach and seduce; He gives space to repent; 'I am he which searcheth the reins and hearts.' Searching Lord. Christ sees every heart and judges.
But they suffer 'that woman Jezebel' to teach and seduce; He gives space to repent; 'I am he which searcheth the reins and hearts.' Searching Lord. Christ sees every heart and judges.
To the rest who hold no such doctrine, 'I will put upon you none other burden. But... hold fast till I come.' Hold on. The faithful need only keep what they have.
To the rest who hold no such doctrine, 'I will put upon you none other burden. But... hold fast till I come.' Hold on. The faithful need only keep what they have.
'He that overcometh... to him will I give power over the nations,' and 'the morning star.' Overcomer's rule. The faithful shall share Christ's reign.
